message:
fix(storage): replace silent depth cap with convergence-based blocked-cache propagation (#154)

The transitive blocked-cache rebuild used MAX_DEPTH=50, silently
truncating propagation for parent-child hierarchies deeper than 50
levels. Descendants beyond that depth incorrectly appeared as "ready".

Changes:
- Raise safety bound from 50 to 10,000 (only guards against cycles)
- On hitting the bound, return an error instead of silently breaking
- Add regression test with 75-level chain to prevent recurrence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
